name: coding-agents
description: 対象 jobsite の Git root に .coding-agents 状態を置き、サブエージェント開発チームで intake / planning / execution / audit を行う。

interface.shortDescription: Target-repo intake and agent-team execution for coding work.
interface.longDescription: Resolves the jobsite or explicit --target-cwd repository, stores .coding-agents state under that target git root, and coordinates intake, planning, execution material, and audit through a parent agent and scoped specialist subagents.
defaultPrompt: Run Coding Agents intake for this target repo.
Plan this coding task with scoped subagents.
